choose a throne:

Event: Magic Well - March 2024
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: S2


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Crimson Destroyer Sword

When attacking, has a 20%-22% chance of restoring 9%-11% health in self.
The unit's attack range is increased by 33% for the duration of the battle.

Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage equal to 25% of their max health to all enemies in a large radius around them and has a 60% chance to injure each enemy hit. The max health of the injured unit is reduced by 25% for the duration of the injury (the injury can last until the end of the battle). Only one injury effect can be applied to an enemy. Every 5 sec, the unit attempts to remove the injury from themself. They have a 40% chance of succeeding, in which case the effect is removed completely. If the attempt fails, the unit is stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
